mapper.select: SELECT N.BOARD_NO, N.BOARD_TITLE, N.BOARD_CONTENT, N.BOARD_WRITE_DATE, N.BOARD_VIEW_COUNT, N.BOARD_DEL_FL, M.MEMBER_NAME FROM NOTICE N JOIN MEMBER M USING (MEMBER_NO) ORDER BY N.BOARD_WRITE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( BOARD_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, MEMBER_NO ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{memberNo} )
